title: <div>  •  Possible Outcomes (Based on Majority Vote &amp Player’s Defense Roll):
content:
• Possible Outcomes (Based on Majority Vote & Player’s Defense Roll):
• Exile: The betrayer is permanently removed from the faction.
• Forgiveness with Cost: The betrayer stays but loses XP, buffs, or items.
• Public Retribution: The betrayer must perform a task for the faction.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Maintains balance between stealth and consequence.
✔ Encourages roleplay and class-wide interaction.
✔ Prevents betrayal from being overpowered while keeping it fun.

📜 3. Public vs. Secret Real-World Influence Mechanics

📜 Determining which real-world influences should be public knowledge and which should remain hidden.

✔ 🔍 Publicly Known Influences:
• Seating Position Mechanics (Front row gets first rolls, back row gets wildcard buffs/debuffs.)
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 479 (chunk 479/555)
